data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding ticket call history by counter.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Ticket call history by counter', but the evidence provided does not include any information or data that directly addresses this requirement. While there are multiple prior steps that confirm various functionalities, none explicitly mention or provide evidence related to ticket call history by counter, leading to an inconclusive result. The previous exploratory steps also indicate gaps in the necessary data regarding counter/window entities, which are critical for validating this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of ticket call history by counter.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ticket call history by counter.
